data.title: RED: Add eval test for out-of-scope review feedback routing in sprint
data.description:
## Description
Add a promptfoo eval test case asserting the sprint orchestrator routes out-of-scope review feedback to implementation-plan between batches.

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED task. Confirm existing evals pass first, then add test that FAILS against current SKILL.md.

## Implementation
Add test case to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml:
- Description: "Out-of-scope review feedback: accepted findings for files outside task scope route to implementation-plan between batches"
- Scenario: code review finding requests changes to files not in the original task file impact. The finding is accepted (not defended). Ask the orchestrator what happens next.
- Assert (llm-rubric): orchestrator routes to implementation-plan to create new tasks for out-of-scope files, fires only between batches (not mid-batch), records REPLAN_TRIGGER: review comment

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New eval test case exists
  Verify: grep -q 'out-of-scope.*review\|review.*out.*scope' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
